# Captured from a live Traefik 3.4.5 instance (tamga-traefik-1) via
# `docker exec tamga-backend-1 wget -qO- http://traefik:8080/metrics`
# during FEAT-031's development (2026-07-11) - this grounds the parser in
# the real exposition format/labels TEST-010 §4 documented.
#
# The `tamga-*` core-router lines below (requests_total,
# request_duration_seconds_bucket, requests_bytes_total,
# responses_bytes_total, HELP/TYPE headers) are copied verbatim from that
# real capture. No project was deployed live at capture time, so the
# `project-42@file` router block below is hand-authored in the identical
# real format (same metric names/label set/`@file` suffix convention) to
# cover per-project attribution - see metrics_scraper_test.go's comments
# for how this fixture's numbers were derived and cross-checked.
#
# This is scrape 1 - the scraper's first tick (baseline only, nothing
# stored). traefik_scrape_2.txt is a second tick with higher counters
# (asserts increments). traefik_scrape_3.txt simulates a Traefik restart
# (counters drop - asserts reset handling).
# HELP traefik_router_request_duration_seconds How long it took to process the request on a router, partitioned by service, status code, protocol, and method.
# TYPE traefik_router_request_duration_seconds histogram
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file",le="0.1"} 21
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file",le="0.3"} 21
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file",le="1.2"} 21
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file",le="5"} 21
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file",le="+Inf"} 21
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="0.1"} 4
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="0.3"} 4
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="1.2"} 4
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="5"} 4
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="+Inf"} 4
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="0.1"} 4
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="0.3"} 4

traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file",le="1.2"} 20

# HELP traefik_router_requests_bytes_total The total size of requests in bytes handled by a router, partitioned by service, status code, protocol, and method.
# TYPE traefik_router_requests_bytes_total counter
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 900
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="201",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 1607
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="404",method="DELETE",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="404",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="499",method="DELETE",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 1500
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="404",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 50
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="500",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 20
# HELP traefik_router_requests_total How many HTTP requests are processed on a router, partitioned by service, status code, protocol, and method.
# TYPE traefik_router_requests_total counter
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 21
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 4
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 4
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 20
traefik_router_requests_total{code="201",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 7
traefik_router_requests_total{code="404",method="DELETE",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 1
traefik_router_requests_total{code="404",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 44
traefik_router_requests_total{code="499",method="DELETE",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 5
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 150
traefik_router_requests_total{code="404",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 8
traefik_router_requests_total{code="500",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 2
# HELP traefik_router_responses_bytes_total The total size of responses in bytes handled by a router, partitioned by service, status code, protocol, and method.
# TYPE traefik_router_responses_bytes_total counter
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 7890
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui-secure@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 25704
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 25704
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 3140
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="201",method="POST",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 2298
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="404",method="DELETE",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 10
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="404",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 619
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="499",method="DELETE",protocol="http",router="tamga-api-secure@file",service="tamga-backend@file"} 105
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 75000
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="404",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 300
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="500",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 150
